sections.paragraph:
Arab. عَلذَ Med. Waw, to flee for refuge, (kindred roots are עוּשׁ, חוּשׁ), followed by בְּ to any one, Isa 30:2.

Hiphil, causat. to cause to flee, i.e. to set any thing in safety (Germ. feine Habe flüchten), Exo 9:19, and without an acc. to set one’s own things in safety, Isa 10:31 Jer 4:6 6:1 .
